No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its focus on interdisciplinary understanding and critical observation of art fosters skills for sustainable development and cultural appreciation (Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course examines artists and the 'art world,' implicitly relating to creative work, entrepreneurship, and promoting local culture (Targets 8.3, 8.9).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's core focus on Pierre Bourdieu's 'Distinction' directly examines how cultural taste creates social distinction and inequality, aligning strongly with Targets 10.2 and 10.3.
